title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at ECIL

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at ECIL
jsonLd.description:
ECIL, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
